name: arctic dock
identity: A resilient plant with dark green, broad leaves adapted to arctic conditions, found growing in snow-dusted terrain. It is a valuable resource for fermentation and sustains life in harsh environments.
current_status: Harvested by the player as part of the tribe's efforts to cultivate sheltered plots, contributing to their survival and adaptability in the harsh winter environment.

volatile_state.current_activity: being harvested by the player as part of the tribe's cultivation efforts
volatile_state.condition: resilient, thriving in harsh arctic environment
